description: CSS adjustments to region diorama: width 1300px, move rows up 50px more, add 50px vertical gap between rows, z-index above honor track.
steps: Change .region-diorama-modal max-width from 1000px to 1300px and add width:1300px
Change .region-diorama-stage margin-bottom from 50px to 100px (move rows up 50px more)
Add gap:50px to .region-diorama-stage for vertical spacing between rows
Change .region-diorama-backdrop z-index from 1000 to 1200 (above honor track z-index:1100)
acceptance_criteria: npx vite build completes without errors
verification: Run `npx vite build` in /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent and confirm exit code 0 with no errors
